title: lycopodina denticulata
intro: Lycopodina denticulata, also known as Denticulata Lycopodina, is a plant species belonging to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae) that grows in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Lycopodina denticulata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin irritations due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Lycopodina denticulata is typically used in herbal preparations in the form of infusions or decoctions, although specific uses may vary depending on the region and available preparations.
